ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the station */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment used at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather observation */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that made the observation */,
  "observation_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the observation */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the weather conditions */,
  "precip_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (if any) */,
  "observation_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which observations are made */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Name of the person or system that made the observation */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag indicating the quality of the observation */,
  "observation_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_observations_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation that the reading belongs to */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "apparent_temperature" REAL /* Apparent temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point in degrees Celsius */,
  "heat_index" REAL /* Heat index in degrees Celsius */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_readings_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity reading */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation that the reading belongs to */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity as a percentage */,
  "relative_humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity as a percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_readings_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind reading */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation that the reading belongs to */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "wind_bearing" REAL /* Wind bearing in degrees */,
  "wind_gust" REAL /* Highest wind speed recorded during the observation period */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Descriptive wind direction (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_readings_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visibility_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visibility reading */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation that the reading belongs to */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in km */,
  "minimum_visibility" REAL /* Lowest visibility recorded during the observation period */,
  "maximum_visibility" REAL /* Highest visibility recorded during the observation period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visibility_readings_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cloud_cover_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud cover reading */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation that the reading belongs to */,
  "cloud_cover" INTEGER /* Cloud cover as a percentage */,
  "cloud_type" TEXT /* Type of clouds observed */,
  "cloud_base_height" REAL /* Height of the cloud base above the ground */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cloud_cover_readings_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pressure_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pressure reading */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation that the reading belongs to */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure in millibars */,
  "sea_level_pressure" REAL /* Pressure adjusted to sea level */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of the pressure (e.g., rising, falling, steady) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pressure_readings_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES weather_observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_summaries" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily summary */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that the summary belongs to */,
  "summary_date" TEXT /* Date of the summary */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the weather conditions for the day */,
  "high_temperature" REAL /* Highest temperature recorded during the day */,
  "low_temperature" REAL /* Lowest temperature recorded during the day */,
  "total_precipitation" REAL /* Total precipitation recorded during the day */,
  "average_wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the day */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_summaries_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for emergency contact */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the data was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station that the forecast belongs to */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Weather forecast for the day */,
  "high_temperature" REAL /* Forecasted high temperature for the day */,
  "low_temperature" REAL /* Forecasted low temperature for the day */,
  "precipitation_probability" REAL /* Probability of precipitation */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Forecasted average wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Forecasted wind direction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast version */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast that the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Weather forecast for the day */,
  "high_temperature" REAL /* High temperature in the forecast version */,
  "low_temperature" REAL /* Low temperature in the forecast version */,
  "precipitation_probability" REAL /* Probability of precipitation in the forecast version */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed in the forecast version */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction in the forecast version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_versions_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES weather_forecasts ("forecast_id")
)
